'''Victor Pomt''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the [[Staff Chief]] of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Viqi Shesh]]. Pomt aided Shesh on several bribery assassination attempts, hiring freelance [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Roxi Barl]] for the senator. After several attempts against [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] failed, another of Shesh's minions [[Death/Legends|killed]] Pomt, making it look like a suicide so he could take the blame and remove suspicion from Shesh.
